movie.synopsis: Sapta Sagaradache Ello – Side A (2023) Sapta Sagaradaache Ello (2023) In the heart of ‘Sapta Sagaradaache Ello’ (Somewhere Beyond the Seven Seas), resides an ardent love story between Manu and Priya. Set in 2010, the couple hails from a middle-class background. Circumstances land Manu in jail, putting his relationship with Priya in jeopardy.
